action_items.action: URGENT — Learning Hub goes live in TODAY's weekly release. Gabriel reminded the pod at 09:39: 'The Learning Hub goes live with our weekly release.' He then asked Carlos to check if Mike is happy with Ciara's imagery (GDCU-8736). Carlos raised Figma design questions in #gdc-pod at 11:34 (h1 size, green vs blue icons) — Ciara responded and gave direction. Mike still needs to give formal sign-off so GDCU-8736 can be closed before deployment.

GDCU-8893 Design System — Chloe Christie asked in #gdc-product-design-pod at 09:53: 'Are we happy to close the design system ticket?' This is the Highest priority In Product ticket. Confirm whether Ciara published the Claude Design Guidelines announcement today (expected 'first thing') and if so, sign off and close GDCU-8893. Respond to Chloe's question in-channel.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign still Blocked (day 14). Last updated 2026-04-28 09:42. No movement since morning. Ciara is actively working but block is not cleared. Direct intervention or decision from Mike required today.

NEW — GDCU-8895 High priority bug: Prediction Market Page Not Appearing on US Sitemap (Sanja Budic, In Progress, updated 12:10 today). Not in morning report. High-priority US sitemap issue — check if stakeholder comms required and whether timeline is impacted.

RESOLVED TODAY ✅ — GDCU-8870 Page Timeouts (Nebojsa Stanic) moved to Done at 12:35. GDCU-8871 F2P App POC v2 (Carlos Blauth) moved to Done at 11:46. Both were In Product this morning. Remove from review queue — no further action needed.

NEW — GDCU-8879 Genesis Brand Carousel Component Card (Jessica Dordevic) pulled BACK from In Product to In Progress today (10:34). Was listed for sign-off this morning. Check with Jessica what changed — design revisions needed? Will need re-review when it returns to In Product.

NEW — GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic) pulled BACK from In Product to In Progress today (08:51). Was listed for formal sign-off this morning. Check with Jessica what changed — will need re-review when it returns.

NEW — GDCU-8932 raised by Joshua Smith at 13:11 today: Game Review tiles on gambling.com/uk/online-casinos/slots/games — CTA buttons oversized and white tile backgrounds not filling the full tile (post-pixel change). Ticket exists; Mike to triage priority and confirm if it goes into this sprint or next.

NEW — Josh asked in #gdc-product-design-pod at 10:49: 'Is everyone OK with closing GDCU-8737 (Slot Hub Search Refinements) since the broader GDCU-8685 Search & Filter Components Audit is planned for next sprint?' Awaiting Mike's call — no response yet in-channel.

NEW — Ciara called @here in #gdc-product-design-pod at 12:01: 'I'm cleaning up the main Figma design file — there are 16 open branches. With tomorrow's release: what can we merge?' Jess responded that registration/login and pros and cons components can be merged. Ciara then asked at 13:01: 'Is there a pros and cons dev ticket lined up?' — no response yet. Mike to confirm and ensure dev ticket exists if needed.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8842 Integrate Genesis Content Layouts (Harden Thomas Wallace, In Product) updated again today at 09:46. Still awaiting Mike's sign-off. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Chloe Christie.
CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8866 Automation Bug Fixing & Refactoring Sprint 8 (Robin John, In Product since 2026-04-28). Still awaiting Mike's standard sprint quality sign-off.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners (Jessica Dordevic, In Progress). Sent to Jessica yesterday — two promo banners for IUJ Rewards Page & Home Page. Note she also pulled back two tickets today (GDCU-8879, GDCU-8546) so check her workload and confirm she has everything needed for all three tasks.
Vic Dadson still on sick leave — expected back ~2026-05-05. No new messages today. No action needed unless sprint planning or cover decisions are required.
